title: Copper Blocker
description: Small QOL Fabric Mod that removes all unwaxed copper variants from the creative inventory!
body:
**Are you tired of always having to check if you really picked the waxed copper block while building? Fear no more!**

This small **QOL** mod just **removes** the unwaxed version of all copper blocks to **declutter** the creative inventory. **End copper spam!**

## Before:
![Before image of the cluttered creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a45a0f9faedb4dcd5cd9ed6d488e0e398b306ba4.png)

## After:
![After image of the cleaned up creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae0035bc87df73e9d173fd9c5ca2ae6d1a71c803.png)
